completed_slice: Implemented and tested a fail-closed dispatch decision builder that binds a verified preflight verdict to one exact repository, commit, workflow, ref, and sanitized branch input.
verification: Five deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime before commit.
remaining_blocker: Valid CLOUDFLARE_ACCOUNT_ID and CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN must be configured in the cloudflare-research GitHub environment before the production workflow can prove deployment and hostname resolution.
next_action: Wire the dispatch decision builder into the preflight artifact workflow, then require an allowed exact-commit decision before dispatching cloudflare-pages-research.yml.
